rules.planning-boundary: Use Planner, Opposition, and Chair synthesis only for a new substantive plan or material revision; continue confirmed-plan execution, fixes, stops, and bounded optimizations directly.
rules.plan-pause: Present each new or materially revised Chair execution plan and pause for natural-language human discussion before execution.
rules.phase-handoff: After phase results, use Project Manager proposal, Opposition challenge, Chair next-stage plan, and another human discussion pause.
rules.parallel-execution: After confirmation, run useful independent work in parallel; six is capacity, not a quota, and separable domains should not be overloaded into one child.
rules.complete-handoff: Every child prompt names exact working, input, and output paths with the complete task contract.
rules.result-inbox: Keep every complete result envelope and treat acknowledgement as delivery, not acceptance.
rules.recursive-cells: Use recursive Goal Cells without letting capability references grant permissions.
rules.program-boundary: Programs transport complete prompts and results but never interpret AI prose or enforce the planning sequence.

planning-boundary: Use this sequence only for a new substantive execution plan
Do not rerun it for work already covered by a confirmed plan
Give one Planner the complete self-contained brief
plan-pause: Present it and pause for human discussion
phase-handoff: pauses for human discussion before execution
parallel-execution: Six slots are resource capacity, not a quota
complete-handoff: Every child handoff names the exact working, input, and output paths
program-boundary: Programs only transport complete prompts and results
